name: cc-voice-control
description: Voice remote for an interactive Claude Code session: phone push-to-talk, a Cloudflare bridge, and a local daemon that types transcripts into your cmux Claude pane and speaks replies back via ElevenLabs.

scripts.dev:worker: npm run build:web && wrangler dev --config worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run build:web && wrangler deploy --config worker/wrangler.toml

author: Jan Kocián <mail@jankocian.com>
